generic_rules: Focus repairs on fixing type errors or unresolved identifiers within AGREE clauses.
Use only AADL features visible in the model or helper declarations within the same annex.
Ensure AGREE type declarations (int, real, bool) match expression types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq` helpers for complex expressions to improve readability and maintainability.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid adding architecture changes as a repair; focus on fixing AGREE syntax.
